name: Request Access for a Partner
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto by Maropost\u2019s approved partners provide professional support, advice, and services. When you contract a partner to work for you, they often need access to your control panel or site template files via SFTP."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To grant access to your control panel and/or site template files via SFTP for an approved Neto\u00a0partner:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://netoecommerce.wufoo.com/forms/request-partner-access", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "request partner access"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0form."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Upon submission, the request is reviewed by the Neto by Maropost\u00a0partner team and approved if the relevant verification criteria are met."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once approved, notification will be sent to you and the partner via email."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Requests are processed between 9 am-5 pm, Monday-Friday, and are normally completed within 1 business day. Our team can check who has existing partner access to your site, as well as revoke access if no longer needed."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
